---
title: "Match Report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
    fig_crop: false
    keep_tex: false
    includes:
      in_header: pdf_styles.tex
params:
  match_id: 4036731
  providers:
    - statsbomb
  home_team: "Germany"
  away_team: "Curacao"
  home_color: "#1F77B4"
  away_color: "#FF7F0E"
  chart_titles: null
  featured_icon_player: "Jamal Musiala"
  featured_left_foot_player: null
  shot_map_scope: "full"
  shot_map_iterate_palette: true
  shot_map_icon_set: "footprint"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
is_pdf <- knitr::is_latex_output()

fig_width  <- if (is_pdf) 9 else 10
fig_height <- if (is_pdf) 5.2 else 6

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = fig_width,
  fig.height = fig_height,
  fig.align = "center",
  out.width = if (is_pdf) "95%" else "100%",
  dpi = 150
)

`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x
here <- if (file.exists("reports/_setup.R")) "reports" else if (file.exists("_setup.R")) "." else ".."
source(file.path(here, "_setup.R"))
load_project(root = normalizePath(file.path(here, ".."), mustWork = FALSE))

match_id <- params$match_id
active_providers <- params$providers %||% "statsbomb"
if (length(active_providers) == 1 && identical(active_providers, "all")) {
  active_providers <- resolve_providers_for_match("all", match_id = match_id)
} else {
  active_providers <- unique(as.character(active_providers))
}

for (prov in active_providers) {
  rda_path <- get_provider_processed_path(prov)
  if (!file.exists(rda_path)) {
    build_all_matches(
      match_ids = match_id,
      provider = prov,
      save_path = rda_path
    )
  }
}

primary_provider <- if ("statsbomb" %in% active_providers) {
  "statsbomb"
} else {
  active_providers[1]
}

primary_data <- load_match_data(primary_provider, match_id)
meta <- primary_data$meta

if (nrow(meta) == 0) {
  stop("No data for match ", match_id, ". Build processed data first.")
}

team_colors <- setNames(
  c(params$home_color, params$away_color),
  c(meta$home_team, meta$away_team)
)
team_labels <- team_display_map(
  meta$home_team,
  meta$away_team,
  meta$display_home,
  meta$display_away
)

subtitle <- match_chart_subtitle(meta)
chart_titles <- resolve_chart_titles(meta, params$chart_titles)
slug <- figure_slug(meta$home_team, "vs", meta$away_team)
```

# `r meta$display_home` `r meta$home_score`–`r meta$away_score` `r meta$display_away`

`r subtitle`

```{r provider-sections, results='asis'}
events_child <- file.path(here, "_provider_sections.Rmd")
summary_child <- file.path(here, "_provider_sections_summary.Rmd")
if (!file.exists(events_child)) {
  base_dir <- dirname(knitr::current_input(dir = TRUE))
  events_child <- file.path(base_dir, "_provider_sections.Rmd")
  summary_child <- file.path(base_dir, "_provider_sections_summary.Rmd")
}

for (provider in active_providers) {
  pdata <- load_match_data(provider, match_id)
  events <- pdata$events
  pms <- pdata$player_match_stats
  meta <- pdata$meta

  if (nrow(meta) == 0) {
    next
  }

  use_events <- events_usable_for_viz(events)
  use_summary <- provider_has_summary_viz(provider) && nrow(pms) > 0

  if (!use_events && !use_summary) {
    message(
      "Skipping provider ", provider, " for match ", match_id,
      ": no event or summary data."
    )
    next
  }

  fig_dir <- get_figures_dir(match_id, provider = provider)
  subtitle <- match_chart_subtitle(meta)
  chart_titles <- resolve_chart_titles(meta, params$chart_titles)
  slug <- figure_slug(meta$home_team, "vs", meta$away_team)
  team_colors <- setNames(
    c(params$home_color, params$away_color),
    c(meta$home_team, meta$away_team)
  )
  team_labels <- team_display_map(
    meta$home_team,
    meta$away_team,
    meta$display_home,
    meta$display_away
  )

  child_path <- if (use_events) events_child else summary_child
  child_lines <- readLines(child_path, warn = FALSE)
  child_lines <- gsub("^```\\{r ", paste0("```{r ", provider, "_"), child_lines)

  cat("\n\n## ", provider_section_label(provider), "\n\n")
  cat(knitr::knit_child(text = child_lines, quiet = TRUE))
}
```
